tour_guide.text: Dmitros delivered the tour as a one-act tragedy about the parents that never loved him back. Guests applauded at the wrong moment.
Heavy on atmosphere, light on directions, Dmitros gestured at fog like it was a character. People got lost but looked moved.
A master class: Dmitros made a fence post feel haunted. A guest asked for his autograph on a pamphlet about ley lines.

kitchen.text: The cooking was...passionate...but not particularly good.
Dmitros cooked with passion and cleaned with indifference. The guests were happy, the next person to use the kitchen will not be.
A triumph of culinary drama. Dmitros called it 'rustic intimacy.' Guests asked for seconds and left inspired.

housekeeping.text: Dmitros 'cleaned' by rearranging clutter into tragic tableaux. The room is technically worse but emotionally louder.
Bare minimum cleaning, exceptional hemming on a guest's ritual robe. They left a five-line thank-you poem on the mirror.
He channeled energy into tailoring instead of dusting. Guests received custom cuffs and called the room 'curated darkness.'

ritual.text: Dmitros went full avant-garde: whispering, crawling, smearing himself with (stage..?) blood. It did NOT land.
Strong stage presence, novice occult mechanics. Looks cool; authenticity is 'community theater with incense.'
The flair carried it. Dmitros hit every beat like opening night. Guests said it felt expensive, which is close enough.
Dmitros went full avant-garde: whispering, crawling, smearing himself with (stage..?) blood. The guests couldn't stop talking about it.
